creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to MMacD from comment #0)
> The documentation for the plugin
> http://docs.xfce.org/apps/screenshooter/panel-plugin says " You can
> configure how screenshots are taken by right clicking on the plugin and
> selecting Properties. A preferences dialog similar to the dialog of the main
> application will appear. Please have a look above for the different
> preferences. " 
> 
> No Preferences item or dialog appears when the plugin is right-clicked

I'm taking a look at this, but I can't reproduce your problem.

I've added the plugin to my panel. Clicking on it gives me a menu with the option "Properties" which actually opens a windows with some configurables in it.

Can you confirm the plugin is now working as expected like it's doing on my system?

Thanks.
